title: Resetting your corporate VPN password
body: If your VPN credentials are no longer accepted, request a password reset through the self-service portal at portal.example.com/reset. The new password becomes active within 5 minutes. Use the same password for VPN and 2FA enrollment. If reset fails, contact the account team.

title: Troubleshooting 2FA and MFA issues
body: Most 2FA failures fall into three buckets: (1) clock drift on the authenticator device - resync the device clock, (2) enrolled phone number changed - re-enroll via portal.example.com/mfa, (3) backend gateway degraded - check status board. The hard-token PIN is separate from the VPN password.

title: Connection timed out after VPN 2FA prompt
body: Symptom: VPN client accepts the password and 2FA code but then shows 'Connection timed out'. Common causes: (a) Auth gateway degraded - check status, (b) split-tunnel DNS resolves the gateway to the wrong IP - flush DNS or set 8.8.8.8, (c) corporate firewall blocking UDP/4500 from the user's ISP. Try the fallback gateway vpn-fallback.example.com.

title: Setting up Outlook on a new device
body: Outlook autodiscover requires the corporate root certificate. Install it from portal.example.com/certs first, then add the account using your standard email address. If autodiscover loops, configure manually with mail.example.com:993 (IMAP) and smtp.example.com:587 (SMTP). 2FA app passwords are required.

title: Requesting access to a shared drive
body: File-share access requests go through the access portal. Specify the share path (e.g. \\fs01\projects\acme), the access level (read or read-write), and the data owner's name. Standard SLA is one business day. Requests for finance or legal shares require additional sign-off and may take up to three days.

title: How to install company-approved software
body: Open the Software Center on your endpoint (Start menu -> Software Center). Approved titles install without admin rights. For software not listed, file a request and the endpoint team will package and publish it within 5 business days. Do not install software from outside the catalog - the EDR agent will block and quarantine.

title: Wi-Fi connection issues at the office
body: Use the SSID 'Corp-Wifi' and your domain credentials (use the format USER@example.com, not DOMAIN\\USER). The 'Guest-Wifi' SSID is sandboxed and cannot reach internal services or the VPN. If the laptop reports 'Cannot find network', forget the saved profile and reconnect with the certificate prompt accepted.

title: Account lockout after failed sign-in attempts
body: Five failed sign-in attempts in 15 minutes lock the account for 30 minutes. The account team can release a lock immediately during business hours. Repeated lockouts often indicate a stale session on a phone or tablet still trying the old password - sign out everywhere from portal.example.com/sessions.
